title: India's central bank warns of Iran war-fueled inflation, growth risks as it keeps policy rates steady
summary: India's central bank is addressing growth risks and inflation pressures stemming from the Iran war, which has increased energy costs and disrupted global supplies. The central bank kept policy rates steady while managing these competing concerns.
content: India’s central bank needs to weigh growth risks and inflation pressures from the Iran war as higher energy costs and supply disruptions mount.

zh.title: 印度中央银行警告伊朗战争引发的通货膨胀和增长风险，同时保持政策利率不变
zh.summary: 印度中央银行正在应对伊朗战争造成的增长风险和通胀压力，该战争导致能源成本上升并中断了全球供应。中央银行在管理这些相互矛盾的关切的同时保持了政策利率不变。

title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire relief rally lifts global assets as oil plunges below $100
summary: A 2-week ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran sparked a broad relief rally across global risk assets, with oil prices falling below $100 per barrel. The agreement also boosted traditional safe-haven assets as investors reduced geopolitical hedges.
content: A 2-week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran sparked a broad-based relief rally across risk assets, and even buoying traditional safe havens.

zh.title: 美伊停火协议缓解性上涨推高全球资产，油价跌至100美元以下
zh.summary: 美伊之间为期两周的停火协议引发了全球风险资产的广泛缓解性上涨，油价跌至每桶100美元以下。该协议也推高了传统避险资产，因为投资者减少了地缘政治对冲。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump's truce sparks global relief rally
summary: Stock futures surged and oil prices plunged following the Trump administration's announcement of a 2-week ceasefire with Tehran. The agreement offers temporary relief from geopolitical tensions affecting energy markets.
content: Stock futures surge and oil prices plunge as the Trump administration and Tehran agree a 2-week ceasefire.

zh.title: CNBC每日开市：特朗普的休战协议引发全球缓解性上涨
zh.summary: 特朗普政府宣布与德黑兰达成为期两周的停火协议后，股指期货飙升，油价暴跌。该协议为受地缘政治紧张局势影响的能源市场提供了临时缓解。

title: Foodbank hub set to expand to meet growing demand
summary: Stratford Foodbank is preparing to move to a larger facility to meet growing demand for its food assistance services. The expansion reflects increasing community need for support.
content: Stratford Foodbank is preparing to move to a larger unit, to meet growing demand for its services.

zh.title: 粮食库中心准备扩展以满足不断增长的需求
zh.summary: 斯特拉特福德粮食库正在准备搬迁到更大的设施，以满足不断增长的食品援助服务需求。这次扩展反映了社区日益增加的支持需求。

title: Jet fuel supply concerns grow as war with Iran drags on, airlines cut flights
summary: Jet fuel prices have nearly doubled in the U.S. since military operations against Iran intensified, prompting airlines to reduce flights. Supply concerns are expected to persist as the conflict continues.
content: Fuel prices have nearly doubled in the U.S. since the United States and Israel attacked Iran.

zh.title: 随着与伊朗的战争持续，喷气燃料供应担忧加剧，航空公司削减航班
zh.summary: 自从对伊朗的军事行动加强以来，美国的喷气燃料价格几乎翻倍，促使航空公司减少航班。预计随着冲突继续，供应担忧将持续。

title: Gulf countries scramble to intercept missiles hours into U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement
summary: Gulf region countries reported intercepting ballistic missiles and drones from Iran hours after the U.S. and Iran announced a 2-week ceasefire agreement. The continued military activity raised immediate questions about the ceasefire's stability.
content: Many Middle Eastern countries continued to report incoming ballistic missiles and drones from Iran on Wednesday, within hours after the U.S. and Iran announced a two-week ceasefire.

zh.title: 美伊停火协议生效数小时后，海湾国家争相拦截导弹
zh.summary: 美伊宣布为期两周的停火协议数小时后，海湾地区国家报告称成功拦截了来自伊朗的弹道导弹和无人机。持续的军事活动立即引发了对停火协议稳定性的质疑。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Markets cheer as Trump and Tehran agree to 2-week ceasefire
summary: Global markets rallied after President Trump announced a 2-week ceasefire with Iran and Tehran signaled plans to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The agreement eased investor concerns about sustained energy supply disruptions.
content: Markets are rejoicing after President Donald Trump announced a two week cease-fire with Iran and Tehran signaled a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 特朗普与德黑兰同意2周停火 市场欢呼雀跃
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布与伊朗达成2周停火协议，德黑兰表示计划重新开放霍尔木兹海峡后，全球市场上扬。该协议缓解了投资者对能源供应持续中断的担忧。

title: South Korea stocks lead gains in Asia as U.S.-Iran agree to a ceasefire
summary: Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran, which boosted Asian markets at open. This agreement delays planned U.S. military action and provides time for diplomatic negotiations between the two countries.
content: Asia-Pacific markets opened higher after President Donald Trump said he agreed to suspend planned attacks on Iranian infrastructure for two weeks.

zh.title: 韩国股票在美伊停火协议下领涨亚洲
zh.summary: 特朗普宣布与伊朗达成两周停火协议，推动亚洲市场开盘走高。该协议延迟了计划中的美国军事行动，为两国间的外交谈判提供了时间。

title: Stock futures surge, oil prices slide as Trump announces two-week cease-fire with Iran
summary: Following Trump's announcement of a two-week Iran ceasefire, U.S. stock futures jumped while oil prices fell. The deal delays planned American military action and allows time for diplomatic negotiations.
content: U.S. stock futures jumped and oil prices fell on Tuesday evening, after President Donald Trump announced a two-week-long cease-fire deal with Iran that would delay a planned American bombing assault on the country and make more time for negotiations between the two sides.

zh.title: 特朗普宣布与伊朗两周停火后，股指期货上涨，油价下跌
zh.summary: 在特朗普宣布与伊朗达成两周停火后，美国股指期货跳涨，油价下跌。该协议延迟了计划中的美国军事行动，为外交谈判争取了时间。

title: Oil prices plunge below $100 after Iran agrees to safe passage through Strait of Hormuz during ceasefire
summary: Oil prices dropped below $100 per barrel after Iran agreed to allow safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz during the ceasefire period. Trump reached the deal following discussions with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.
content: President Donald Trump agreed to the ceasefire with Iran after discussions with Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.

zh.title: 伊朗同意停火期间允许通过霍尔木兹海峡后，油价跌破100美元
zh.summary: 伊朗同意在停火期间允许通过霍尔木兹海峡后，油价跌至每桶100美元以下。特朗普在与巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫进行讨论后达成了该协议。

title: Trump faces calls for removal over threats to wipe out 'whole civilization' in Iran
summary: Trump's threats to escalate U.S. military action against Iran have prompted calls for his impeachment or removal from office. The statements have intensified concerns about potential escalation in the Middle East.
content: President Donald Trump's threats to ramp up the U.S. offensive in Iran prompted calls for his impeachment or removal.

zh.title: 特朗普因威胁摧毁伊朗"整个文明"而面临撤职呼声
zh.summary: 特朗普升级对伊朗军事行动的威胁引发了对其弹劾或撤职的呼声。这些声明加剧了人们对中东可能升级的担忧。

title: Music giant Universal gets $64bn takeover offer
summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square has made a $64 billion takeover offer for Universal Music Group, which represents major artists including Taylor Swift and Sabrina Carpenter. The offer represents a potential major consolidation in the music industry.
content: The music giant behind acts such as Taylor Swift and Sabrina Carpenter gets an offer from Bill Ackman's Pershing Square.

zh.title: 音乐巨头环球唱片获得640亿美元收购要约
zh.summary: 比尔·艾克曼的Pershing Square向环球音乐集团提出了640亿美元的收购要约，该公司代表包括泰勒·斯威夫特和莎布丽娜·卡彭特等主要艺术家。这项要约代表了音乐行业可能的重大整合。

title: Trump-Iran agree to two-week ceasefire, plan to open Strait of Hormuz
summary: Trump agreed to a two-week ceasefire with Iran following a request from Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif for a diplomatic delay. The agreement includes plans to open the Strait of Hormuz for the ceasefire period.
content: Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif had asked Trump for a two-week delay of his Iran deadline, and for the Strait of Hormuz to open for the same period.

zh.title: 特朗普与伊朗同意两周停火，计划开放霍尔木兹海峡
zh.summary: 在巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫要求外交延期后，特朗普与伊朗达成了为期两周的停火协议。该协议包括在停火期间开放霍尔木兹海峡的计划。
